shellCommands.command: pwd && rg -n "finite|preload|thumbnail|thumbnails" src test tests 2>/dev/null | head -240
printf '%s\n' '--- top-level ---'; rg --files -g '!node_modules' -g '!dist' | head -200; printf '%s\n' '--- package ---'; sed -n '1,220p' package.json

printf '%s\n' '--- source files ---'; find src test -type f 2>/dev/null | sort | head -240; printf '%s\n' '--- relevant references ---'; grep -RInE 'finite|preload|thumbnail|thumbnails' src test 2>/dev/null | head -300

sed -n '1,260p' src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx; printf '%s\n' '--- tests ---'; sed -n '1,190p' test/unit/plugins/Thumbnails.spec.ts; printf '%s\n' '--- carousel ---'; sed -n '80,155p' src/modules/Carousel.tsx

sed -n '1,240p' src/contexts/LightboxState.tsx; printf '%s\n' '--- utils/index exports ---'; grep -RIn "function getSlide\|const getSlide\|export.*getSlide" src; sed -n '1,180p' src/utils.ts; printf '%s\n' '--- git state/history ---'; git status --short; git log --oneline -8 -- src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx

git show --stat --oneline bafdda0 && git show bafdda0 -- src/modules/Carousel.tsx src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx test/unit/plugins/Thumbnails.spec.ts; git log -p -5 -- src/plugins/thumbnails/ThumbnailsTrack.tsx
git remote -v; git branch -a; git tag --sort=-version:refname | head -20; grep -RIn "expectThumbnails\|yarl__thumbnails_thumbnail" test/unit src | head -100
sed -n '1,180p' src/types.ts; sed -n '1,100p' src/index.ts; sed -n '1,80p' src/props.ts; sed -n '1,140p' test/unit/utils.tsx; git diff -- src test

sed -n '1,240p' AGENTS.md 2>/dev/null || true; git show f63f6af90a2e0d70fe04a126001076151178eb78:src/utils.ts | tail -45; git show f63f6af90a2e0d70fe04a126001076151178eb78:src/modules/Carousel.tsx | sed -n '1,145p'
